name: Layered Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh peach slices OR 16 oz Can sliced peaches, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large glass bowl, layer fruit in the order specified.
2. In a separate bowl, mix cream cheese, lemon juice, and lemon rind.
3. In another bowl, whip cream just until peaks form; add powdered sugar and whip to stiff peaks.
4. Fold the cream cheese mixture and whipped cream mixture together.
5. Spread over fruit and sprinkle with walnuts.
6. Serve immediately or store, covered, in refrigerator.
